title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Zappfresh

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Zappfresh
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zappfresh! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zappfresh:
Zappfresh is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zappfresh!
